ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "persona" TEXT /* Name of the character's persona */,
  "shadow" TEXT /* Name of the character's shadow representation */,
  "arcana" TEXT /* Arcana type associated with the character */,
  "personality" TEXT /* Personality trait of the character */,
  "weakness" TEXT /* Weaknesses of the character */,
  "health_points" INTEGER /* Health points of the character */,
  "magic_points" INTEGER /* Magic points of the character */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength attribute of the character */,
  "agility" INTEGER /* Agility attribute of the character */,
  "intelligence" INTEGER /* Intelligence attribute of the character */,
  "luck" INTEGER /* Luck attribute of the character */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the character was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the character was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_level FOREIGN KEY ("level") REFERENCES levels ("level_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_weakness FOREIGN KEY ("weakness") REFERENCES weaknesses ("weakness_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_persona FOREIGN KEY ("persona") REFERENCES personas ("persona_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_shadow FOREIGN KEY ("shadow") REFERENCES shadows ("shadow_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_arcana FOREIGN KEY ("arcana") REFERENCES arcanas ("arcana_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_personality FOREIGN KEY ("personality") REFERENCES personalities ("trait_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_number" INTEGER /* The level number the player must reach */,
  "experience_required" INTEGER /* Experience points required to reach this level */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty rating of the level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personas" (
  "persona_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each persona */,
  "persona_name" TEXT /* Name of the persona */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the persona's traits or role */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of persona (e.g., demon, angel) */,
  "element" TEXT /* Element associated with the persona (e.g., fire, water) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("persona_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shadows" (
  "shadow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shadow */,
  "shadow_name" TEXT /* Name of the shadow */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shadow's traits or role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shadow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arcanas" (
  "arcana_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arcana */,
  "arcana_name" TEXT /* Name of the arcana */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the arcana's significance */,
  "element" TEXT /* Element associated with the arcana (e.g., earth, air) */,
  "symbolism" TEXT /* Symbolism of the arcana (e.g., balance, transformation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arcana_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personalities" (
  "personality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personality trait */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the personality trait */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the personality trait */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the personality trait on gameplay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weaknesses" (
  "weakness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weakness */,
  "weakness_type" TEXT /* Type of weakness (e.g., Gun, Wind) */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weakness */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the weakness on gameplay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weakness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_progression" (
  "progression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progression record */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character progressing */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level achieved */,
  "experience_gained" INTEGER /* Experience gained during this progression */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of progression */,
  "gold_gained" INTEGER /* Gold gained during this progression */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_progression_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_progression_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_character" (
  "user_character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-character link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character associated with the user */,
  "playtime" INTEGER /* Playtime spent with the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_character_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_character_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user playing the game */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game session */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode of the session (e.g., story, multiplayer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_builds" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character build */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the build */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character associated with the build */,
  "build_name" TEXT /* Name of the character build */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character build */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_builds_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_builds_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the community post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who unlocked the achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "date_unlocked" TEXT /* Date the achievement was unlocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
